CustomField.description: Controls how the Amount field is used to calculate each installment Opportunity amount for Fixed-Length Recurring Donations. Multiply By: Amount is the per-installment amount. Divide By: Amount is the total, divided equally across installments.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: For Fixed-Length recurring donations: Multiply By means each installment equals the Amount. Divide By means the Amount is the total, split evenly across all planned installments.
CustomField.label: Schedule Type
